data.title: Lawsuit filed by NY Times against A.I. start-up Perplexity over copyright infringement, joining 40+ similar cases in federal court.
data.description: Submitted to federal court last Friday, this lawsuit is one of over 40 legal battles involving copyright holders and artificial intelligence firms.

data.title: Marvion Inc. signs exclusive MOU with STAR Warehouse Engineering Limited for client referrals, strengthening logistics; 12-month agreement.
data.description: Today, in Hong Kong on December 5, 2025, Marvion Inc. (OTCQB: MVNC) disclosed their new partnership with STAR Warehouse Engineering Limited. The 12-month binding Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) ensures that STAR will provide exclusive and prioritized referrals. This agreement solidifies a prosperous collaboration between the two companies.

data.title: Urbana 25 event to bring thousands of Gen Z young adults to Phoenix, AZ from Dec. 28, 2025 to Jan. 1, 2026 for purpose and faith exploration.
data.description: In late December 2025 to early January 2026, Phoenix, AZ will host a gathering of numerous young adults. Scheduled to take place from December 28, 2025, to January 1, 2026, this event aims to bring together thousands of members of Generation Z. This generation, born between the mid-1990s and early 2010s, is characterized by a strong desire for authenticity and meaning in their lives. Against the backdrop of a turbulent world, they seek genuine purpose, impactful faith, and proactive engagement. It is anticipated that this event will attract a significant number of participants, creating an environment for connection, inspiration, and dialogue among the younger demographic.

data.title: Georgia Forestry Foundation, USDA Forest Service, SLB fund projects exploring mass timber in built environment.
data.description: Funding and technical support have been granted to project teams to investigate the use of mass timber in construction. The Georgia Forestry Foundation, alongside the USDA Forest Service and the Softwood Lumber Board (SLB), announced the recipients of this support in Forsyth, Georgia on December 5, 2025. The initiative aims to promote the utilization of mass timber in the built environment.

data.title: ResearchAndMarkets.com offers Japan Colocation Data Center Portfolio Report for 2025-2028 analyzing 121 existing data centers, 50 upcoming data centers, and 46 major operators/investors. Tokyo and Osaka are key locations, with major players like AT TOKYO, NTT Global Data Centers, Equinix, MC Digital Realty, AirTrunk, Colt Data Centre Services, and IDC Frontier commanding over 1 GW of operational capacity.
data.description: A new database titled "Japan Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" has recently been integrated into ResearchAndMarkets.com's services. Leading companies including AT TOKYO, NTT Global Data Centers, Equinix, MC Digital Realty, AirTrunk, Colt Data Centre Services, and IDC Frontier jointly hold more than 1 GW of operational capacity in Japan. The nation currently houses over 120 operational data centers, with Tokyo and Osaka serving as prominent locations. In the year 2025, Japan is anticipated to continue its significant presence in the data center industry.

data.title: Guardant Health will present 14 abstracts at 2025 SABCS on liquid biopsy tests for breast cancer, focusing on outcomes and treatment tailoring.
data.description: In Palo Alto, California, Guardant Health, Inc. (Nasdaq: GH), a prominent precision oncology firm, is set to unveil 14 abstracts with research partners at the 2025 San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium from Dec. 9–12, 2025. The presentations will showcase findings from various studies that emphasize the effectiveness of Guardant Health's tissue-free liquid biopsy tests. Specifically, the discussions will focus on Guardant Reveal, the company's test for identifying minimal residual disease (MRD). This event marks an important platform for sharing insights and innovations in cancer research.

data.title: Alpha Modus launches pilot with major national retailer for ~100 AlphaCash kiosks in Texas, aiming for 4,000+ US locations.
data.description: Alpha Modus has secured a partnership with a top national retailer to introduce approximately 100 AlphaCash kiosks in Texas. The collaboration also includes plans to expand to over 4,000 targeted locations across the United States.
